ip_risk_notes: Sudoku is a generic puzzle format. Avoid 'Will Shortz', 'Penny Press', 'KAPPA', 'New York Times' style branding.

unique_hook.angle: Real travel-size 5x8 trim with airplane-friendly puzzle counts (50 quick puzzles); most 'travel' books in top-10 are still standard 8.5x11
